name: Banana Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 large ripe bananas, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease and flour a 1-quart (6-cup) bundt pan.
2. In a bowl, mix dry ingredients: whole wheat pastry flour, unbleached flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add the sliced bananas to the dry mixture, ensuring they are evenly coated on both sides with flour.
4. In a separate bowl, combine apple juice, maple syrup, and vanilla extract.
5. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients, stirring until just combined.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared bundt pan and spread it evenly.
7. Cover the pan tightly with foil.
8. Place the bundt pan in a large pot filled with about 3 cups of water, ensuring the water does not cover the pan.
9. Bring the water to a boil over high heat. Once boiling, place the lid on the pot and immediately reduce the heat to low.
10. Simmer for 35 minutes.
11. Remove the bundt pan from the water bath using tongs and carefully turn off the heat source.
12. Allow the cake to cool in the pan for a few minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
13. Once cooled, remove the foil and serve.
